questions: Is the bite or sting minor (redness, swelling, itching)? (Yes/No)
Is the bite or sting painful or swollen? (Yes/No)
Are there severe side-effects (e.g., severe swelling, systemic symptoms)? (Yes/No)
Does the person collapse, complain of wheezing, feeling of anxiety or faintness, generalized itching, or tightness in the chest within 1 hour of being stung? (Yes/No)
What is the patient's exact age in years?
Does the patient have any allergies? (Yes/No)
